spanish: Si tuvieras más tiempo, podrías aprender más.
english: If you had more time, you could learn more.

spanish: Quería que hablaras con él.
english: I wanted you to talk to him.

spanish: Me pidió que llegara a las nueve.
english: He asked me to arrive at nine.

spanish: Era necesario que estudiaran más.
english: It was necessary for them to study more.

spanish: Esperaba que llegaras a tiempo.
english: She hoped you would arrive on time.

spanish: Quería que me ayudaras.
english: I wanted you to help me.

spanish: Me alegró que llamaras.
english: I was glad you called.

spanish: Si pudiera, te ayudaría.
english: If I could, I would help you.

spanish: Necesitaba que comieras algo.
english: She needed you to eat something.

spanish: Era importante que viviéramos cerca.
english: It was important that we live nearby.

spanish: Me pidió que escribiera una carta.
english: She asked me to write a letter.

spanish: Quería que aprendieras español.
english: She wanted you to learn Spanish.

spanish: Esperaba que leyeras el libro.
english: He hoped you would read the book.

spanish: Si fuera más rico, viajaría por el mundo.
english: If I were richer, I would travel the world.

spanish: Quería que fueras al médico.
english: She wanted you to go to the doctor.

spanish: Ojalá fuera verdad.
english: If only it were true.

spanish: Era como si fuera un sueño.
english: It was as if it were a dream.

spanish: Si tuviera dinero, compraría un coche.
english: If I had money, I would buy a car.

spanish: Necesitaba que tuvieras paciencia.
english: She needed you to have patience.

spanish: Era importante que tuviéramos cuidado.
english: It was important that we be careful.

spanish: Quería que hicieras los deberes.
english: She wanted you to do the homework.

spanish: Si hiciera buen tiempo, saldríamos.
english: If the weather were good, we would go out.

spanish: Esperaba que hicieras algo.
english: He hoped you would do something.

spanish: Si estuviera aquí, te ayudaría.
english: If he were here, he would help you.

spanish: Quería que estuvieras en casa.
english: She wanted you to be at home.

spanish: Me pidió que dijera la verdad.
english: He asked me to tell the truth.

spanish: Quería que le dijeras algo importante.
english: She wanted you to tell him something important.

spanish: Ojalá pudiera venir contigo.
english: I wish I could come with you.

spanish: Si pudiera hablar español, viajaría más.
english: If I could speak Spanish, I would travel more.

spanish: Si supiera la respuesta, te la diría.
english: If I knew the answer, I would tell you.

spanish: Quería que supieras la verdad.
english: She wanted you to know the truth.

spanish: Me pidió que pusiera la mesa.
english: She asked me to set the table.

spanish: Quería que vinieras a la fiesta.
english: I wanted you to come to the party.

spanish: Si viniera Juan, estaríamos contentos.
english: If Juan came, we would be happy.

spanish: Ojalá quisiera ayudar.
english: I wish he wanted to help.

spanish: Si hablase más despacio, lo entendería.
english: If he spoke more slowly, I would understand.

spanish: Esperaba que llegasen a tiempo.
english: He hoped they would arrive on time.

spanish: Era necesario que llamaseis antes.
english: It was necessary for you (pl.) to call first.

spanish: Si comiese menos, estaría más sano.
english: If he ate less, he would be healthier.

spanish: Quería que viviese cerca.
english: She wanted him to live nearby.

spanish: Era importante que escribiesen pronto.
english: It was important that they write soon.

spanish: Si fuese posible, lo haría.
english: If it were possible, I would do it.

spanish: Ojalá tuviese más suerte.
english: I wish I had more luck.

spanish: Si pudiese venir, vendría.
english: If I could come, I would come.

spanish: Quería que dijese la verdad.
english: She wanted him to tell the truth.

spanish: Si estuviese aquí, sería mejor.
english: If he were here, it would be better.

spanish: Espero que hayas llegado bien.
english: I hope you arrived safely.

spanish: No creo que haya terminado ya.
english: I don't think he has finished yet.

spanish: Es posible que hayan salido.
english: It's possible they have left.

spanish: Me alegra que hayas venido.
english: I'm glad you have come.

spanish: Cuando hayas comido, llámame.
english: When you have eaten, call me.

spanish: Dudo que haya dicho eso.
english: I doubt he said that.

spanish: Es importante que hayamos terminado para entonces.
english: It's important that we have finished by then.

spanish: No es verdad que hayáis ganado.
english: It's not true that you (pl.) have won.

spanish: Ojalá hayan llegado ya.
english: I hope they have already arrived.

spanish: Es una pena que no hayas podido venir.
english: It's a pity you haven't been able to come.

spanish: Si hubiera estudiado más, habría aprobado.
english: If I had studied more, I would have passed.

spanish: Me alegró que hubiera venido.
english: I was glad he had come.

spanish: No creía que hubieran terminado.
english: I didn't think they had finished.

spanish: Si hubieras llegado antes, habrías visto.
english: If you had arrived earlier, you would have seen.

spanish: Habló como si hubiera vivido allí.
english: He spoke as if he had lived there.

spanish: Si lo hubiera sabido, no habría ido.
english: If I had known, I would not have gone.

spanish: Era imposible que hubiera dicho eso.
english: It was impossible that he had said that.

spanish: Ojalá hubiera llegado antes.
english: I wish he had arrived earlier.

spanish: Si tuviera más dinero, viajaría.
english: If I had more money, I would travel.

spanish: Si fuera más joven, correría más.
english: If I were younger, I would run more.

spanish: Si supiera cocinar, lo haría más.
english: If I knew how to cook, I would do it more.

spanish: Si pudiera elegir, viviría en el campo.
english: If I could choose, I would live in the countryside.

spanish: Si estuviera cansado, dormiría.
english: If he were tired, he would sleep.

spanish: Si quisiera, podría hacerlo.
english: If he wanted to, he could do it.

spanish: Si viniera Juan, lo celebraríamos.
english: If Juan came, we would celebrate.

spanish: Si hubiera comido menos, no estaría enfermo.
english: If he had eaten less, he wouldn't be sick.

spanish: Si hubiera llegado antes, habríamos podido hablar.
english: If he had arrived earlier, we could have talked.

spanish: Si lo hubiera pedido, te habría ayudado.
english: If you had asked for it, I would have helped you.

spanish: Si hubiera tenido tiempo, lo habría hecho.
english: If I had had time, I would have done it.

spanish: Si hubieras venido antes, habrías visto la película.
english: If you had come earlier, you would have seen the movie.

spanish: Si hubiera estudiado medicina, sería médico ahora.
english: If I had studied medicine, I would be a doctor now.

spanish: Si no hubiera nevado ayer, haría menos frío hoy.
english: If it hadn't snowed yesterday, it would be less cold today.

spanish: Para el lunes, habré terminado el proyecto.
english: By Monday, I will have finished the project.

spanish: Cuando llegues, ya habremos comido.
english: When you arrive, we will have already eaten.

spanish: Para las cinco, habrá salido.
english: By five o'clock, he will have left.

spanish: Creo que ya habrán llegado.
english: I think they will have already arrived.

spanish: Para el fin de año, habré aprendido mucho.
english: By the end of the year, I will have learned a lot.

spanish: Cuando leas esto, ya me habré ido.
english: When you read this, I will have already left.

spanish: Para cuando lleguen, habremos preparado todo.
english: By the time they arrive, we will have prepared everything.

spanish: Con más ayuda, habría terminado antes.
english: With more help, I would have finished sooner.

spanish: Si hubiera tenido tiempo, habría venido.
english: If I had had time, I would have come.

spanish: Habría llamado, pero no tenía tu número.
english: I would have called, but I didn't have your number.

spanish: Habríamos ido de no ser por la lluvia.
english: We would have gone if not for the rain.

spanish: Dijo que habría terminado para el martes.
english: He said he would have finished by Tuesday.

spanish: Sin tu ayuda, no habría podido hacerlo.
english: Without your help, I wouldn't have been able to do it.

spanish: El libro fue escrito por Cervantes.
english: The book was written by Cervantes.

spanish: La carta fue enviada ayer.
english: The letter was sent yesterday.

spanish: Los premios serán entregados mañana.
english: The prizes will be given out tomorrow.

spanish: La ciudad fue fundada en el siglo XII.
english: The city was founded in the 12th century.

spanish: El edificio fue construido por arquitectos famosos.
english: The building was built by famous architects.

spanish: La ley fue aprobada por el Parlamento.
english: The law was approved by Parliament.

spanish: Los documentos fueron firmados por el director.
english: The documents were signed by the director.

spanish: El ladrón fue detenido por la policía.
english: The thief was arrested by the police.

spanish: Se hablan cinco idiomas en esa empresa.
english: Five languages are spoken in that company.

spanish: Se venden pisos en este edificio.
english: Apartments are sold in this building.

spanish: Se construyeron tres puentes el año pasado.
english: Three bridges were built last year.

spanish: Se necesitan trabajadores cualificados.
english: Qualified workers are needed.

spanish: Se alquilan habitaciones amuebladas.
english: Furnished rooms are rented.

spanish: Se firmaron los acuerdos ayer.
english: The agreements were signed yesterday.

spanish: La puerta está cerrada.
english: The door is closed.

spanish: El trabajo está terminado.
english: The work is finished.

spanish: Los documentos están firmados.
english: The documents are signed.

spanish: La ventana estaba abierta cuando llegué.
english: The window was open when I arrived.

spanish: La mesa está puesta para la cena.
english: The table is set for dinner.

spanish: Los platos están lavados.
english: The dishes are washed.

spanish: Dijo que estaba cansado.
english: He said he was tired.

spanish: Me contó que había llegado tarde.
english: He told me that he had arrived late.

spanish: Explicó que vendría al día siguiente.
english: He explained that he would come the following day.

spanish: Dijo que había terminado el trabajo.
english: She said she had finished the work.

spanish: Nos contó que vivía en Madrid.
english: He told us he lived in Madrid.

spanish: Afirmó que lo sabía todo.
english: She claimed she knew everything.

spanish: Prometió que estaría allí.
english: He promised he would be there.

spanish: Me aseguró que había pagado.
english: She assured me that she had paid.

spanish: Le dijo que viniera inmediatamente.
english: He told him to come immediately.

spanish: Le pidió que le ayudara.
english: She asked him to help her.

spanish: Le aconsejé que descansara.
english: I advised him to rest.

spanish: Le ordenó que saliera de la sala.
english: He ordered her to leave the room.

spanish: Me pidió que no dijera nada.
english: He asked me not to say anything.

spanish: Le rogó que se quedara.
english: She begged him to stay.

spanish: Aunque llueva, iremos al partido.
english: Even if it rains, we'll go to the match.

spanish: Aunque estaba cansada, siguió trabajando.
english: Even though she was tired, she kept working.

spanish: Aunque sea difícil, lo intentaré.
english: Even if it's difficult, I'll try.

spanish: Aunque no me guste, tengo que hacerlo.
english: Even though I don't like it, I have to do it.

spanish: Por mucho que estudies, no aprenderás en un día.
english: No matter how much you study, you won't learn in a day.

spanish: Por más que lo intente, no lo consigue.
english: No matter how hard he tries, he can't manage it.

spanish: A pesar de que estaba cansado, siguió trabajando.
english: Despite being tired, he kept working.

spanish: A pesar de la lluvia, salimos a caminar.
english: Despite the rain, we went for a walk.

spanish: Puesto que no tienes dinero, te presto yo.
english: Since you don't have money, I'll lend you some.

spanish: Ya que estás aquí, ayúdame con esto.
english: Since you're here, help me with this.

spanish: Ya que lo sabes, cuéntamelo.
english: Since you know it, tell me.

spanish: Dado que no hay más preguntas, concluimos.
english: Given that there are no more questions, we'll conclude.

spanish: Debido a la lluvia, cancelamos el partido.
english: Due to the rain, we cancelled the match.

spanish: Debido a que llegó tarde, perdió el tren.
english: Because he arrived late, he missed the train.

spanish: No estudié, por lo tanto suspendí el examen.
english: I didn't study, therefore I failed the exam.

spanish: Llegué tarde, así que me perdí el principio.
english: I arrived late, so I missed the beginning.

spanish: Habló despacio, de modo que todos le entendieron.
english: He spoke slowly, so that everyone understood him.

spanish: No vino, por consiguiente perdió la reunión.
english: He didn't come, consequently he missed the meeting.

spanish: Estudió mucho, de manera que aprobó fácilmente.
english: She studied a lot, so she passed easily.

spanish: En cuanto llegues, llámame.
english: As soon as you arrive, call me.

spanish: En cuanto sepa algo, te aviso.
english: As soon as I know something, I'll let you know.

spanish: Tan pronto como hayas terminado, puedes ir.
english: As soon as you have finished, you can go.

spanish: Tan pronto como lleguen, empezamos.
english: As soon as they arrive, we'll start.

spanish: Cuando hayas comido, descansa un poco.
english: When you have eaten, rest a little.

spanish: Cuando tengas tiempo, visítame.
english: When you have time, visit me.

spanish: Cuando sea mayor, seré médico.
english: When I am older, I will be a doctor.

spanish: Espera hasta que haya terminado.
english: Wait until I have finished.

spanish: No salgas hasta que yo llegue.
english: Don't leave until I arrive.

spanish: Mientras estés aquí, tienes que respetar las normas.
english: While you are here, you have to respect the rules.

spanish: Mientras vivas en mi casa, cumple las normas.
english: While you live in my house, follow the rules.

spanish: Vendré a menos que llueva.
english: I'll come unless it rains.

spanish: Lo haré a menos que me digas que no.
english: I'll do it unless you tell me not to.

spanish: Puedes ir con tal de que vuelvas pronto.
english: You can go as long as you come back soon.

spanish: Te dejo el coche con tal de que conduzcas con cuidado.
english: I'll lend you the car as long as you drive carefully.

spanish: Siempre que estudies, aprobarás.
english: As long as you study, you'll pass.

spanish: Siempre que haga buen tiempo, salimos a caminar.
english: Whenever the weather is good, we go for a walk.

spanish: Lleva paraguas en caso de que llueva.
english: Take an umbrella in case it rains.

spanish: En caso de que haya problemas, llámame.
english: In case there are problems, call me.

spanish: Lo hizo por amor, no por dinero.
english: He did it for love, not for money.

spanish: El libro fue escrito por un autor famoso.
english: The book was written by a famous author.

spanish: Lo cambié por otro modelo.
english: I exchanged it for another model.

spanish: Estudié por tres horas seguidas.
english: I studied for three hours straight.

spanish: Pasamos por el centro de la ciudad.
english: We passed through the city center.

spanish: Gano veinte euros por hora.
english: I earn twenty euros per hour.

spanish: Firmé el documento por él.
english: I signed the document on his behalf.

spanish: Te llamé tres veces por teléfono.
english: I called you three times by phone.

spanish: Estudio para aprender, no para aprobar.
english: I study to learn, not to pass.

spanish: Esta carta es para María.
english: This letter is for María.

spanish: Salgo para Madrid mañana.
english: I'm leaving for Madrid tomorrow.

spanish: Lo necesito para el lunes.
english: I need it by Monday.

spanish: Para mí, es demasiado difícil.
english: For me, it's too difficult.

spanish: Para ser principiante, habla muy bien.
english: For a beginner, he speaks very well.

spanish: Trabaja para una empresa internacional.
english: She works for an international company.

spanish: Busco a alguien que sepa japonés.
english: I'm looking for someone who knows Japanese.

spanish: Necesito un piso que sea barato.
english: I need an apartment that is cheap.

spanish: ¿Conoces a alguien que pueda ayudarme?
english: Do you know anyone who can help me?

spanish: Quiero un trabajo que me guste.
english: I want a job that I like.

spanish: Busco un hotel que tenga piscina.
english: I'm looking for a hotel that has a pool.

spanish: No hay nadie que sepa la respuesta.
english: There is no one who knows the answer.

spanish: ¿Hay alguien que hable inglés aquí?
english: Is there anyone who speaks English here?

spanish: Si hablaras más despacio, te entendería mejor.
english: If you spoke more slowly, I would understand you better.

spanish: Era necesario que descansaras.
english: It was necessary for you to rest.

spanish: Esperaba que trabajaras más.
english: She hoped you would work more.

spanish: Si aprendieras más, encontrarías trabajo.
english: If you learned more, you would find work.

spanish: Necesitaba que salieras pronto.
english: She needed you to leave soon.

spanish: Ojalá fuera posible visitarte.
english: I wish it were possible to visit you.

spanish: Si fueras más cuidadoso, no habrías tenido el accidente.
english: If you were more careful, you wouldn't have had the accident.

spanish: Si tuviéramos más tiempo, haríamos más.
english: If we had more time, we would do more.

spanish: Si hicieras ejercicio, te sentirías mejor.
english: If you exercised, you would feel better.

spanish: Si estuviéramos allí, podríamos ayudar.
english: If we were there, we could help.

spanish: Si dijeran la verdad, todo sería más fácil.
english: If they told the truth, everything would be easier.

spanish: Ojalá pudiéramos quedarnos más tiempo.
english: I wish we could stay longer.

spanish: Si supiéramos la solución, la diríamos.
english: If we knew the solution, we would say it.

spanish: Espero que haya llegado a tiempo.
english: I hope she arrived on time.

spanish: No creo que hayamos cometido un error.
english: I don't think we have made a mistake.

spanish: Si hubieran llegado antes, habrían visto todo.
english: If they had arrived earlier, they would have seen everything.

spanish: Lamentó que hubiera perdido la oportunidad.
english: She regretted that he had missed the opportunity.

spanish: Si hiciera sol, iríamos a la playa.
english: If it were sunny, we would go to the beach.

spanish: Si hablaras con él, lo entenderías.
english: If you talked to him, you would understand.

spanish: Si hubiera pedido ayuda, no habría fracasado.
english: If he had asked for help, he would not have failed.

spanish: Si hubieras esperado, habrías podido venir.
english: If you had waited, you would have been able to come.

spanish: Para el viernes, habrás recibido la respuesta.
english: By Friday, you will have received the answer.

spanish: Cuando termines, yo ya me habré marchado.
english: When you finish, I will have already left.

spanish: Habría llamado antes, pero no sabía tu número.
english: I would have called earlier, but I didn't know your number.

spanish: Sin su apoyo, no habría tenido éxito.
english: Without his support, I would not have succeeded.

spanish: La novela fue traducida a veinte idiomas.
english: The novel was translated into twenty languages.

spanish: El problema fue resuelto por los ingenieros.
english: The problem was solved by the engineers.

spanish: Se ofrecen clases de español los martes.
english: Spanish classes are offered on Tuesdays.

spanish: Se realizaron varios experimentos.
english: Several experiments were carried out.

spanish: El contrato está firmado.
english: The contract is signed.

spanish: Los libros están ordenados en la estantería.
english: The books are arranged on the shelf.

spanish: Dijo que no podía venir esa tarde.
english: She said she couldn't come that afternoon.

spanish: Me contó que había conocido a alguien interesante.
english: He told me he had met someone interesting.

spanish: Le dijo que se sentara.
english: She told him to sit down.

spanish: Le pidió que hablara más despacio.
english: She asked him to speak more slowly.

spanish: Aunque no entiendas todo, sigue intentando.
english: Even if you don't understand everything, keep trying.

spanish: Puesto que ya son las diez, debemos irnos.
english: Since it's already ten o'clock, we should go.

spanish: No tenía dinero, así que no pudo comprar nada.
english: He had no money, so he couldn't buy anything.

spanish: En cuanto termine, te mando el informe.
english: As soon as I finish, I'll send you the report.

spanish: Saldré a menos que me lo impidan.
english: I'll leave unless they prevent me.
